Bash(node -e "const pool = require\('./lib/db'\).default; pool.query\('SELECT id, LoopNumLoops, Coverage FROM Orders WHERE IsCommunityOrder = 1 LIMIT 5'\).then\(\([r]\) => { console.log\(r\); pool.end\(\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const mysql=require\('mysql2/promise'\);\(async\(\)=>{const c=await mysql.createConnection\({host:'localhost',user:'root',password:process.env.MYSQL_PASSWORD||'',database:'conditioncover'}\);await c.execute\('ALTER TABLE Tiers ADD COLUMN LoopLoanAPR DECIMAL\(10,6\) NULL'\);await c.execute\(\\"UPDATE Tiers SET LoopLoanAPR=0.020000 WHERE APY=0.070000\\"\);await c.execute\(\\"UPDATE Tiers SET LoopLoanAPR=0.040000 WHERE APY=0.100000\\"\);await c.execute\(\\"UPDATE Tiers SET LoopLoanAPR=0.055000 WHERE APY=0.130000\\"\);await c.execute\(\\"UPDATE Tiers SET LoopLoanAPR=0.065000 WHERE APY=0.150000\\"\);await c.execute\(\\"UPDATE Tiers SET LoopLoanAPR=0.075000 WHERE APY=0.170000\\"\);const [rows]=await c.query\('SELECT Tier,Name,APY,LoopLoanAPR FROM Tiers ORDER BY Tier'\);console.table\(rows\);await c.end\(\)}\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const mysql=require\('mysql2/promise'\);\(async\(\)=>{const c=await mysql.createConnection\({host:'localhost',port:3306,user:'root',password:'a44abe11e7',database:'condition_cover'}\);await c.execute\('ALTER TABLE Tiers ADD COLUMN LoopLoanAPR DECIMAL\(10,6\) NULL'\);await c.execute\(\\"UPDATE Tiers SET LoopLoanAPR=0.020000 WHERE APY=0.070000\\"\);await c.execute\(\\"UPDATE Tiers SET LoopLoanAPR=0.040000 WHERE APY=0.100000\\"\);await c.execute\(\\"UPDATE Tiers SET LoopLoanAPR=0.055000 WHERE APY=0.130000\\"\);await c.execute\(\\"UPDATE Tiers SET LoopLoanAPR=0.065000 WHERE APY=0.150000\\"\);await c.execute\(\\"UPDATE Tiers SET LoopLoanAPR=0.075000 WHERE APY=0.170000\\"\);const [rows]=await c.query\('SELECT Tier,Name,APY,LoopLoanAPR FROM Tiers ORDER BY Tier'\);console.table\(rows\);await c.end\(\)}\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")
